methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 2 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 3 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Joby Aviation
private.rationale: Same sector (Drones & Autonomous), same stage (Public), post-money $10B+

data.narrative:
Archer Aviation is a publicly-traded company in the Drones & Autonomous sector, having raised over $1.5B and currently valued at $5B. The comparable universe in this narrow sector is sparse: zero public peers at similar stage and valuation, with five identified private-market comparables including Joby Aviation, Nuro, Elroy Air, Aurora Innovation, and ideaForge.

Peer-median valuation analysis is not applicable here. The Drones & Autonomous sector contains only three same-sector peers total, and filtering by stage, development tier, or valuation proximity yields fewer than three datapoints in any single subset—the threshold required for reliable triangulation. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material distortion by averaging across heterogeneous business models and development stages.

The absence of public comparables and insufficient same-stage private peers means traditional relative-value methods cannot anchor a defensible valuation range for Archer. Alternative approaches—such as DCF analysis incorporating specific cash-flow forecasts, precedent transaction multiples within the autonomous vehicle / urban air mobility subsector, or venture-backed cost-of-capital frameworks—would be required to assess whether the $5B current valuation is supported. Key uncertainties include regulatory pathway timing for commercial operations, capital intensity of scaling, and competitive positioning relative to the identified private peers. A more granular valuation would require non-public financial and operational data unavailable in this dataset.
